name: Shout Seven
short_description: An online multiplayer strategy game where you try to get 7 in a row by moving your opponents pieces.
detailed_description:
Shout Seven is an online multiplayer strategy game. Each match consists of 2-4 players. The goal is to put 7 of your pieces in a row solely by moving your opponents pieces out of the way. If a stalemate occurs, victory goes to the player who has pushed the most pieces off the board.

Competitive Multiplayer
If you're interested in ranking up, you can use matchmaking to play against players from around the world. Just remember, only one player can hold the rank of monarch.

Play With Friends
If playing with your friends is more your speed, the lobby system is there for you. You can create a lobby for you and your friends or join one with a code from a friend.

Summon the Beasts
When you join a match, you will fight for 1 of 4 of the great beasts from the ancient British Isles.
